questions.question: Describe the advantages of using the chalk and talk method over the PowerPoint presentation method in teaching a topic like 'Metric Spaces'.
questions.hint: Explain how the chalk and talk method encourages active learning and engagement.

questions.question: What are the key differences between the chalk and talk method and a PowerPoint presentation in terms of student interaction and learning outcomes?
questions.hint: Compare and contrast the two methods in terms of their effectiveness in promoting student understanding and retention.

questions.question: Design a lesson plan using the chalk and talk method to teach a topic like 'Metric Spaces' to undergraduate students. Include details of the learning objectives, materials, and assessment methods.
questions.hint: Consider the needs and abilities of your target audience and explain how you will adapt your teaching strategy to accommodate them.
